"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7095293190801984551","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主➕电竞➕无cp】
文案：
盛云是一个技术主播，他不仅有技术，还有颜值，这让他获得了很多粉丝，但是，盛云以前也不知经历了什么，直播的时候不怎么跟粉丝互动，也不怎么说话，看起来很无聊。
盛云有一只布偶猫，名叫云霞，云霞的颜值跟它的主人一样，都是颜值巅峰，盛云一般都是开着摄像头，但是摄像头内只有一只猫的这种情况。
盛云的观察力和反应力堪比职业选手，甚至要比职业选手强得多，这让很多战队的经理来邀请盛云去打职业赛，但是不管怎么跟盛云好说歹说，盛云始终就两个字，“别想。”
但谁都不知道，盛云以前就是因为电竞而留下遗憾的。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/40b9ad4360b338df19e7b3a2036d63e7~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"兰夏柔","author_id":"","book_id":"7095293190801984551","book_name":"带飞全场","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#405870","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7096076196890608159","read_count":"571","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"173491"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.6","serial_count":"44","tags":"双男主,现代,直播,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/40b9ad4360b338df19e7b3a2036d63e7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779448778&x-signature=UmfxnY5qtY6pfKLEXirZLFC7zDc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3457333076689263","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.4591446e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231919387652DBDD0CDDCDC48704"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":25,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":14591,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":17561},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":
